expected_behavior: A 30 m lookup-subgrid full-momentum compound-channel run should reproduce the 10 m explicit full-momentum numerical-reference hydrograph and storage response.
primary_metrics: outlet_q_rmse_m3s; outlet_q_nse; peak_q_error_pct; peak_timing_error_min; cumulative_outlet_volume_error_pct; final_storage_error_pct
acceptance_threshold: NSE >0.90, RMSE <2 m3/s, peak error <15%, timing error <3 min, volume and storage errors <10%
